ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for dividends and stock splits */,
  "stock_ticker" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "market" TEXT /* The market where the stock is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the article (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score (0-100) */,
  "objectivity" REAL /* Objectivity score (0-100) */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the full article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* A score indicating the relevance of the article to the stock market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment decision */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the decision */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock involved in the decision */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (buy/sell) */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share at the time of action */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the investment decision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user who made the decision */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* The investment strategy used */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* The expected return on the investment */,
  "actual_return" REAL /* The actual return on the investment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_decisions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_decisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the summary is created */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the summary period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the summary period */,
  "average_close" REAL /* Average closing price during the period */,
  "highest_price" REAL /* Highest price recorded during the period */,
  "lowest_price" REAL /* Lowest price recorded during the period */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded during the period */,
  "stock_ticker" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "average_volume" INTEGER /* Average volume of shares traded during the period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Measure of the stock's price fluctuation */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* A score indicating the overall performance of the stock during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_summaries_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being analyzed */,
  "positive_score" REAL /* Score for positive sentiment */,
  "neutral_score" REAL /* Score for neutral sentiment */,
  "negative_score" REAL /* Score for negative sentiment */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the sentiment */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* A score indicating the potential impact of the sentiment on the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)
